item.title: FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING: MUSIC & VISUAL WORKSHOP (BEGINNER) learn how to generat...
item.description:
@algorapture

FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING: MUSIC & VISUAL WORKSHOP (BEGINNER)

learn how to generate music + visuals by typing code.
we’ll cover the basics of Strudel (music) and Hydra (visuals).

no coding background needed.

14 March 2026
12:30 - 15:30
97KoboLab, ROW9 Blok M, Jakarta

IDR 229K (normal)
IDR 129K (students)

bring: laptop + headset/earpiece

register:
DM @97kobo.lab
WA +62 851-7158-8508

limited 8 seats only.
item.content:encoded:
@algorapture

FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING: MUSIC & VISUAL WORKSHOP (BEGINNER)

learn how to generate music + visuals by typing code.
we’ll cover the basics of Strudel (music) and Hydra (visuals).

no coding background needed.

14 March 2026
12:30 - 15:30
97KoboLab, ROW9 Blok M, Jakarta

IDR 229K (normal)
IDR 129K (students)

bring: laptop + headset/earpiece

register:
DM @97kobo.lab
WA +62 851-7158-8508

limited 8 seats only.
item.author: algorapture

item.title: 𝗖𝗶𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗲𝘀: • About Algorave: Algorave is a live coding–based electronic...
item.description:
@algorapture

𝗖𝗶𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗲𝘀:
• About Algorave: Algorave is a live coding–based electronic music movement where sound is written and performed in real time. It was founded by Alex McLean and Nick Collins in the UK in 2011. Performances combine self-written code, music, and visuals projected live for the audience. (Algorave.com)

• Algorave Music Practice in Indonesia: Paguyuban Algorave - Patrick Hartono & Stevie J. Sutanto. Published by Cambridge University Press Online, 18 August 2023.

𝗙𝗼𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲:

• Footage 1: Wasawat Somno (TH) - Algorapture Show, 10 October, Krapela, Jakarta.

• Footage 2: 1st Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia Concert, 22 April 2021. Featuring: Patrick Hartono (SuperCollider), Tomy Herseta (Sonic Pi), Rangga Purnama Aji (TidalCycles).

• Footage 3: Agustusan Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia Concert, 21 August 2022. Featuring: Rangga Purnama Aji.

• Footage 4: 1st ALGORAPTURE - Live Coding Audio/Visual Surge, 10 October 2024, Krapela, Jakarta. Featuring: Wasawat Somno (TH), Steadystate (ID).

• Footage 5: 3rd Algorapture - SEAquence Protocol, 3 August 2025, 97KoboLab. Featuring: andrawkx / RMPGNG SLRMN (ID) × Palindroma (RU/TH).

• Footage 6: Monthly Algorapture sessions at 97KoboLab, circa 2025. Featuring: vlusky (ID), KAE (ID), CRSRCRSRRR (TH).

- Algorapture was founded in Jakarta by andrawkx & Steadystate.
- Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia was initiated in Yogyakarta by Bagas Koro Saputra, Mohammad Ali Azca, Maria Maya Aristya, Muhammad Khoirur Roziqin, and Rangga Purnama Aji.

97KoboLab is located at Row9 Building, Blok M, Jakarta.
item.content:encoded:
@algorapture

𝗖𝗶𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗲𝘀:
• About Algorave: Algorave is a live coding–based electronic music movement where sound is written and performed in real time. It was founded by Alex McLean and Nick Collins in the UK in 2011. Performances combine self-written code, music, and visuals projected live for the audience. (Algorave.com)

• Algorave Music Practice in Indonesia: Paguyuban Algorave - Patrick Hartono & Stevie J. Sutanto. Published by Cambridge University Press Online, 18 August 2023.

𝗙𝗼𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲:

• Footage 1: Wasawat Somno (TH) - Algorapture Show, 10 October, Krapela, Jakarta.

• Footage 2: 1st Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia Concert, 22 April 2021. Featuring: Patrick Hartono (SuperCollider), Tomy Herseta (Sonic Pi), Rangga Purnama Aji (TidalCycles).

• Footage 3: Agustusan Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia Concert, 21 August 2022. Featuring: Rangga Purnama Aji.

• Footage 4: 1st ALGORAPTURE - Live Coding Audio/Visual Surge, 10 October 2024, Krapela, Jakarta. Featuring: Wasawat Somno (TH), Steadystate (ID).

• Footage 5: 3rd Algorapture - SEAquence Protocol, 3 August 2025, 97KoboLab. Featuring: andrawkx / RMPGNG SLRMN (ID) × Palindroma (RU/TH).

• Footage 6: Monthly Algorapture sessions at 97KoboLab, circa 2025. Featuring: vlusky (ID), KAE (ID), CRSRCRSRRR (TH).

- Algorapture was founded in Jakarta by andrawkx & Steadystate.
- Paguyuban Algorave Indonesia was initiated in Yogyakarta by Bagas Koro Saputra, Mohammad Ali Azca, Maria Maya Aristya, Muhammad Khoirur Roziqin, and Rangga Purnama Aji.

97KoboLab is located at Row9 Building, Blok M, Jakarta.
item.author: algorapture

item.title: JOIN FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING MUSIC & VISUAL Workshop for Beginners 📅 28 FEB or 1...
item.description:
@algorapture

JOIN
FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING MUSIC & VISUAL
Workshop for Beginners

📅 28 FEB or 1 MAR 2026 (choose one date)
🕧 12:30 – 15:30
📍 97KoboLab, ROW9 Blok M – Jakarta

💸 IDR 229K (normal)
🎓 IDR 129K (students)

REGISTER:
IG bio link @97Kobo.Lab
WA: +62 851-7158-8508
or scan QR

—

No coding background needed.
Just bring your laptop + headset/earpiece.

You’ll learn the fundamentals of live coding music & visuals using Strudel and Hydra.js

*this poster is made on patchies.app

@algorapture

JOIN
FUNDAMENTAL LIVE CODING MUSIC & VISUAL
Workshop for Beginners

📅 28 FEB or 1 MAR 2026 (choose one date)
🕧 12:30 – 15:30
📍 97KoboLab, ROW9 Blok M – Jakarta

💸 IDR 229K (normal)
🎓 IDR 129K (students)

REGISTER:
IG bio link @97Kobo.Lab
WA: +62 851-7158-8508
or scan QR

—

No coding background needed.
Just bring your laptop + headset/earpiece.

You’ll learn the fundamentals of live coding music & visuals using Strudel and Hydra.js
